overall.description: First-person perspective from a bus driver's seat in a driving simulation game, navigating through heavy rain in a modern European city. The bus picks up passengers at a sheltered stop, merges into traffic to overtake large trucks, and drives through wet urban streets with reflective asphalt and contemporary architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered bus stop with passenger boarding area

events.description: bus doors open to allow passengers to board from the shelter
bus closes doors and accelerates away from the stop into traffic

agents.ego_description: stopped at bus shelter with doors open, allowing passengers to board before departing

notable_agents.action: passengers boarding the bus through the front door

entered.detail: glass and metal shelter structure with yellow frame and transparent panels
large yellow truck with STVL branding visible through the rain
covered bench area where passengers wait to board

segments.scene_description: The bus is stopped at a sheltered bus stop during heavy rain. Passengers are boarding through the front door while the windshield wipers clear rain. A large yellow truck is visible ahead on the wet road. The bus then closes its doors and begins to accelerate away from the stop.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban arterial with heavy vehicle traffic

events.description: bus changes lanes to the left to overtake slower traffic
bus overtakes large red articulated truck on the left side

agents.ego_description: accelerating and maneuvering through traffic, overtaking large trucks on the left side

notable_agents.action: large red articulated truck being overtaken by the bus
teal container truck moving slowly ahead of the red truck

entered.detail: long red articulated truck with reflective safety strips
large teal-colored container truck with white roof
multi-story residential buildings with balconies and modern facades

segments.scene_description: The bus accelerates into traffic and changes lanes to overtake a line of slow-moving trucks. The camera passes a large red articulated truck and a teal container truck on the left. Urban apartment buildings line the left side of the street while trees line the right, all visible through the heavy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with intersections and storefronts

events.description: bus approaches and crosses intersection with traffic lights and crosswalks
bus slows slightly while navigating through commercial district traffic

agents.ego_description: navigating through intersections and continuing down wet city streets with moderate traffic flow

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving parallel on the right side

entered.detail: zebra crossing markings on the wet reflective asphalt
modern commercial buildings with ground-floor storefronts and signage
traffic lights suspended over the intersection

segments.scene_description: The bus continues through an urban intersection with crosswalks and traffic signals, then proceeds down a commercial street lined with modern buildings. The wet asphalt creates strong reflections of vehicle headlights and street lights. The bus maintains steady speed through the moderate traffic of the city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus driver's seat, transitioning from a stationary stop in heavy rain to a steady cruise through a reflective urban center. It begins at a sheltered bus stop where passengers board as windshield wipers clear the downpour, before the doors close and the vehicle accelerates away from a large yellow truck. As the bus merges into traffic, the camera maneuvers past a red articulated truck and a teal container truck, flanked by apartment buildings and rain-soaked trees. The scene then shifts into an urban intersection with crosswalks and traffic signals, moving onto a commercial street lined with modern architecture. Finally, the bus maintains a steady speed through the city center, where the wet asphalt creates vivid reflections of headlights and street lights.
